_comment: Forge SELF-DEVELOPMENT prompt-suite state machine (Forge of Forge). This is NOT the adopter seed — it tracks Forge's own improvement roadmap and is excluded from the adopter export (see ../../forge.manifest.json -> selfOnly). next_prompt.py (copied beside it) selects the next eligible prompt by topological dependsOn order. New work items are recorded here by /forge-contribute. Schema reference: ../../prompts/state.schema.md.

prompts.title: Make Forge self-hosting (self/ workspace, manifest + export, forge-selfcheck gate, /forge-contribute, framework CI)
forge-export: adopter copy has no dead self-only targets and is docs-fresh
